message:
You know that one friend who panics at the first sign of a storm? Yep, that’s my buddy Jake. Last winter, when the weather forecast predicted a big snowstorm, he sent out a group text that read like a disaster alert! I couldn’t help but chuckle as he debated whether to stockpile snacks or build a snow fort. 

While I appreciate his enthusiasm for being prepared, it reminded me that staying calm and having a plan is really the best approach. I mean, a few extra snacks never hurt anyone, but the real key is knowing what to do ahead of time! 

After we had a good laugh, I shared some simple tips with Jake (and a little refresher I found) to help ease his mind. How do you handle storm prep in your home? Do you have a friend like Jake?
